revenue.description: Total income generated from business operations before any deductions

expenses.description: Total operating costs incurred during a period, including COGS, R&D, S&M, and G&A

gross profit.description: Revenue minus total expenses; measures core operating profitability

gross margin.description: Gross profit as a percentage of revenue; indicates pricing power and efficiency

ebitda.description: Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization; a proxy for operating cash flow

yoy growth.description: Year-over-year percentage change in revenue compared to the same quarter in the prior year
yoy growth.sql_mapping: SELECT year, quarter, AVG(yoy_growth_pct) FROM quarterly_results GROUP BY year, quarter

qoq growth.sql_mapping: SELECT quarter, total_revenue FROM quarterly_results ORDER BY year, quarter

run rate.description: Annualized projection of current quarterly performance (quarterly revenue × 4)
run rate.sql_mapping: SELECT total_revenue * 4 AS run_rate FROM quarterly_results ORDER BY year DESC, quarter DESC LIMIT 1

net income.description: Profit after all deductions including taxes and interest; the bottom line
net income.sql_mapping: SELECT SUM(ebitda * 0.75) AS estimated_net_income FROM quarterly_results

operating leverage.description: Ratio of fixed to variable costs; higher leverage means more earnings sensitivity to revenue changes

headcount.description: Total number of employees; used for per-employee productivity analysis

q4.description: Fourth fiscal quarter (October to December); typically the strongest revenue quarter
